ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the model */,
  "balanced_accuracy" REAL /* The balanced accuracy of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* The recall of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* The precision of the model */,
  "cohen_cappa" REAL /* Cohen's kappa score for the model */,
  "cappa_m" REAL /* Kappa-m score for the model */,
  "matthews_corrcoef" REAL /* Matthews correlation coefficient for the model */,
  "harmonic_mean" REAL /* Harmonic mean of the model's metrics */,
  "fbeta_score" REAL /* F-beta score of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve (AUC) for the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "gmean" REAL /* Geometric mean of the model's metrics */,
  "evaluation_script_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation script used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the performance metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_evaluation_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_script_id") REFERENCES evaluation_scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training and evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  "domain" TEXT /* The domain of the model (e.g., NLP, CV, Predictive Analytics) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated, in development) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "domain" TEXT /* The domain of the dataset (e.g., NLP, CV, Predictive Analytics) */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "domain" TEXT /* The domain of the algorithm (e.g., NLP, CV, Predictive Analytics) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the algorithm */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this version belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_models" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model artifact */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version this artifact belongs to */,
  "artifact_path" TEXT /* File path to the model artifact */,
  "artifact_size" REAL /* Size of the model artifact in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the artifact was uploaded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the artifact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the artifact was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the artifact */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the artifact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_artifacts_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_artifacts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation script */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this script is used for */,
  "script_path" TEXT /* File path to the evaluation script */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the script */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the script was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the script */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the script */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scripts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scripts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_definitions" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "domain" TEXT /* The domain of the metric (e.g., NLP, CV, Predictive Analytics) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was defined */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who defined the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_definitions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "metric_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metric value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric value */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who recorded the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metric_definitions ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
